description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows arranged in symmetrical rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light gray material, likely concrete or stucco, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The house includes a main rectangular structure and an attached, smaller volume with a rooftop terrace accessible by an exterior staircase. The rear and side elevations have fewer and smaller windows, emphasizing privacy, while the main entryway is understated and integrated into the overall geometric form. The interior layout is open and contemporary, with visible furnishings and partitioned rooms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a minimalist gray exterior. Features include a rooftop terrace and an attached secondary volume.
description_view_0: The front view showcases two stories of large, vertical windows in symmetrical rows and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the attached secondary volume with a rooftop terrace and an exterior staircase, as well as smaller side windows.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid wall with minimal windows and the back of the attached secondary volume.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the flat roof, a series of smaller windows, and the geometric simplicity of the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flush door, no porch, and integrated into the geometric facade
